active_work.text: Takeover queue update: PRs #474, #605, #606, #607, #475, and #473 are merged after fresh current-main 3-OS R-CMD-check evidence; stale bridge wrappers #520, #522, #523, #527, #528, #530, #532, and #534 are closed as superseded by current main; #540 is closed as an unsupported failed optimizer-control slice; #571 and #573 are closed as superseded drafts; only draft PR #574 remains open, held for the close-versus-rework decision because later evidence says the full-data beak sigma-phylo failure is not a start-basin problem.
